---
title: "Frederick Cranley Chamberlayne"
---

## Frederick Cranley Chamberlayne

**Dates:** (1835/6-1839)

### Description

son of Thomas Chamberlayne

### Biography

CMY states that he was christened in 1838 aged 2 and a half.  [Death index; no entry in LG or 1841 census]

### Letters

- Letter from August 6, 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
